testcase.classname: Enrollment status verification from ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully check enrollment status for active member
testcase.system-out: Given SP system checks enrollment for person "ABC451123"...............undefined When A POST request to check enrollment is sent..........................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" head...undefined And The response should contain "enrolled_status"......................undefined And The enrolled_status should be "Active"...............................skipped And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.classname: Enrollment status verification from ESS registry
testcase.name: Enrollment check for unknown person
testcase.system-out: Given SP system checks enrollment for unknown identifier...............undefined When A POST request to check enrollment is sent..........................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The system should return default or inactive status................undefined

testcase.classname: Enrollment status verification from ESS registry
testcase.name: Enrollment response schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid enrollment check request is sent.........................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.classname: Registry event notification endpoint
testcase.name: Successfully receive notification
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives a valid notification event..........................undefined When A POST request to notify is sent..................................undefined Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should contain "ack_status" equal to "ACK"............undefined And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.classname: Registry event notification endpoint
testcase.name: Notification with invalid payload
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives malformed notification..............................undefined When A POST request to notify is sent..................................undefined Then The system should handle it gracefully............................undefined

testcase.classname: Registry event notification endpoint
testcase.name: Notification schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid notification request is sent.............................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.classname: On-search callback receiver for ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully receive on-search callback
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives a valid search_response callback....................undefined When A POST request to on-search is sent.................................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" head...undefined And The response should contain "ack_status" equal to "ACK"............undefined And The response should include "correlation_id".......................undefined And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.classname: On-search callback receiver for ESS registry
testcase.name: On-search with malformed payload
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives invalid JSON payload................................undefined When A POST request to on-search is sent.................................skipped Then The response should still be handled gracefully...................undefined

testcase.classname: On-search callback receiver for ESS registry
testcase.name: On-search response schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid on-search request is sent................................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.classname: Subscription callback handler for ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully receive subscription confirmation callback
testcase.failure: Error: Bad URL protocol: localhost: at useRequest (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:31:13) at /app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:197:20 at CentraRequest.send (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:122:10) at phinx (/app/node_modules/phinx/src/index.js:66:24) at getResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:309:17) at Tosser.setResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:79:27) at Tosser.toss (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:37:18) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
testcase.system-out: Given ESS is ready to receive subscribe callback..........................passed When A POST request to on subscribe is sent...............................failed Then The response from the async search should be received...............skipped And The async search response should have status 200.....................skipped And The on subscribe response should be ACK..............................skipped And The async search response should be returned in a timely manner wi...skipped And The on subscribe response should match the expected JSON schema......skipped

testcase.classname: Subscription callback handler for ESS registry
testcase.name: On-subscribe with malformed payload
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives invalid subscription callback.......................undefined When A POST request to on subscribe is sent..............................skipped Then The response should still be received.............................undefined And The system should handle invalid payload gracefully................undefined

testcase.classname: Unsubscription callback handler for ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully receive unsubscribe confirmation
testcase.failure: Error: Bad URL protocol: localhost: at useRequest (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:31:13) at /app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:197:20 at CentraRequest.send (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:122:10) at phinx (/app/node_modules/phinx/src/index.js:66:24) at getResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:309:17) at Tosser.setResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:79:27) at Tosser.toss (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:37:18) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
testcase.system-out: Given ESS is ready to receive unsubscribe callback........................passed When A POST request to on unsubscribe is sent.............................failed Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The async search response should have status 200.....................skipped And The on unsubscribe response should be ACK............................skipped And The async search response should be returned in a timely manner wi...skipped And The on unsubscribe response should match the expected JSON schema....skipped

testcase.classname: Unsubscription callback handler for ESS registry
testcase.name: On-unsubscribe with missing fields
testcase.system-out: Given ESS receives invalid unsubscribe callback........................undefined When A POST request to on unsubscribe is sent............................skipped Then The response should still be received.............................undefined And The system should handle invalid payload gracefully................undefined

testcase.classname: Async search initiation from ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully initiate async search request
testcase.system-out: Given SP system wants to search for eligible members in ESS............undefined When A POST request to async search is sent..............................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" head...undefined And The response should contain "ack_status" equal to "ACK"............undefined And The response should contain a valid "correlation_id"...............undefined And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.classname: Async search initiation from ESS registry
testcase.name: Async search request with missing transaction_id
testcase.system-out: Given SP system sends search request without transaction_id............undefined When A POST request to async search is sent..............................skipped Then The response should still be received.............................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The system should handle missing transaction_id gracefully.........undefined

testcase.classname: Async search initiation from ESS registry
testcase.name: Async search response schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid async search request is sent.............................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.name: Successfully subscribe to events
testcase.system-out: Given SP system subscribes to ESS events...............................undefined When A POST request to subscribe is sent.................................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" head...undefined And The response should contain "ack_status" equal to "ACK"............undefined And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.name: Subscribe response schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid subscribe request is sent................................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.classname: Synchronous search from ESS registry
testcase.name: Successfully perform synchronous search
testcase.system-out: Given SP system requests member data from ESS..........................undefined When A POST request to sync search is sent...............................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response status should be 200..................................undefined And The response should have "Content-Type": "application/json" head...undefined And The response should contain "search_response"......................undefined And The response should include at least one "reg_record"..............undefined And The response should be returned within 15000ms.....................undefined

testcase.classname: Synchronous search from ESS registry
testcase.name: Sync search by valid UIN returns member data
testcase.system-out: Given SP system searches using UIN "42343545654".......................undefined When A POST request to sync search is sent...............................skipped Then The response should contain member "Alice Smith"..................undefined And The employment_status should be "employed".........................undefined

testcase.classname: Synchronous search from ESS registry
testcase.name: Sync search with unknown UIN
testcase.system-out: Given SP system searches using invalid UIN "00000000000"...............undefined When A POST request to sync search is sent...............................skipped Then The response should be received...................................undefined And The response should contain empty or default "reg_records".........undefined

testcase.classname: Synchronous search from ESS registry
testcase.name: Sync search response schema validation
testcase.system-out: Given A valid sync search request is sent..............................undefined When The response is received..........................................undefined Then The response should match the expected JSON schema................undefined

testcase.classname: Synchronous transaction status check from ESS
testcase.name: Successfully retrieve transaction status
testcase.failure: Error: Bad URL protocol: localhost: at useRequest (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:31:13) at /app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:197:20 at CentraRequest.send (/app/node_modules/centra/model/CentraRequest.js:122:10) at phinx (/app/node_modules/phinx/src/index.js:66:24) at getResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:309:17) at Tosser.setResponse (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:79:27) at Tosser.toss (/app/node_modules/pactum/src/models/Tosser.js:37:18) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
testcase.system-out: Given System wants to retrieve transaction status synchronously...........passed When A POST request to sync status is sent................................failed Then The sync status response should be received.........................skipped And The async search response should have status 200.....................skipped And The transaction status should be "completed".........................skipped And The sync status response should be returned in a timely manner w...undefined And The sync status response should match the expected JSON schema.......skipped

testcase.classname: Synchronous transaction status check from ESS
testcase.name: Sync status with invalid transaction id
testcase.system-out: Given System sends invalid transaction id for status check.............undefined When A POST request to sync status is sent...............................skipped Then The sync status response should be received.........................skipped And The response should handle invalid transaction gracefully..........undefined
